Off Calendar Jan-29-2024 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-11-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

RE: PLAINTIFF DONATUS MCCOY's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement and consent judgment" is granted.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (302/RBU)

***After hearing, an order and judgment are signed.
